1 
;T. acidophilum is a 28-subunit barrel-shaped complex. It contains 2 stacked homoheptameric rings of beta subunits flanked by 2 homoheptameric rings of alpha subunits. One half of the 20S complex is contained in the asymmetric unit (one ring of beta and one ring of alpha subunits.

? 
2 
;PA26 is a homoheptameric ring that binds to the end of the 20S proteasome through interactions with the 20S alpha subunits. One PA26 complex is contained in the asymmetric unit.
